G-male-en-01.ref_text: The Roman army campaigned across three continents for over 500 years, and in all that time, its soldiers marched through deserts, forests, and frozen mountains, building a fortified camp every single night before they slept. Because the system they created was so precise, so disciplined, and so brutally enforced, that no guard dared close his eyes. Knowing that his own brothers would be the ones to end his life if he failed.

J-male-es-01.ref_text: En 1986, el nivel del mar de Galilea bajó como no lo había hecho en siglos. La sequía expuso el fondo de barro negro y dos pescadores, Moshe y Yuval Lufan, vieron algo asomando entre el lodo.
